0.query:
timeseries {latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99),
           requests = sum(dt.service.request.count), 
           errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count)},
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))

| lookup [ timeseries http_5xx = sum(dt.service.request.count,default: 0.0),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: (http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599) and
                   in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))],
            sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:dt.entity.service,
            prefix: "http5xx."

| lookup [ timeseries http_4xx = sum(dt.service.request.count,default: 0.0),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: (http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499) and
                   in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))],
            sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:dt.entity.service,
            prefix: "http4xx."

| lookup [fetch dt.davis.problems, from:now()-7h, to:now()
  | filter event.status=="ACTIVE" and dt.davis.is_duplicate==false// and matchesPhrase(affected_entity_ids, "SERVICE-")
  | expand affected_entity_ids
  | summarize {Problems = countDistinct(display_id),
               event.id = takeFirst(event.id),
               event.kind = takeFirst(event.kind)}, 
               by:{affected_entity_ids}],
  sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:affected_entity_ids, 
  fields:{Problems, affected_entity_ids,event.id,event.kind}    

| fieldsAdd Latency_p50 = arrayAvg(latency_p50),
            Latency_p90 = arrayAvg(latency_p90),
            Latency_p99 = arrayAvg(latency_p99),
            Requests = arraySum(requests), 
            Errors = arraySum(errors),
           `5xx` = arraySum(http5xx.http_5xx),
           `4xx` = arraySum(http4xx.http_4xx) 
| fieldsAdd `Failure Rate` = (Errors/Requests) *100
| fieldsAdd Service = entityName(dt.entity.service)

| fieldsAdd `Analyze Service` = concat("[", Service, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=", dt.entity.service, "&detailsFrom=",$dt_timeframe_from,"&detailsTo=",$dt_timeframe_to,")")
| fields 
//         Status = if(Problems >= 0 , "PROBLEM",  else: "HEALTHY"),
         Status = if(`Failure Rate` >= 2.00 , "🔴",  else: "🟢"),  
       
         Service,
         `Analyze Service`,
         dt.entity.service,
         StatusSort = if(Problems > 0, 0, else: 1),
         Requests,
         `Failure Rate`,
         Errors,
        `5xx` = concat("[",if(isNull(`5xx`), 0, else:`5xx`),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+http.response.status_code+>%3D+500+AND+http.response.status_code+<%3D+599&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"),
        `4xx` = concat("[",if(isNull(`4xx`), 0, else:`4xx`),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+http.response.status_code+>%3D+400+AND+http.response.status_code+<%3D+499&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"),

         Latency_p50,
         Latency_p90,
         Latency_p99,
         event.id,
         event.kind,
         `Failed Spans` = if(`Failure Rate` > 0, concat(
          "[📉Analyze](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+request.is_failed+%3D+true&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"
          ), else: ""),
         `Service Failures` = if(`Failure Rate` > 0, concat(
          "[📊Analyze](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/failure-analysis?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"
          ), else: "")
          
//| sort StatusSort
| sort `Failure Rate` desc
| fieldsRemove StatusSort
| filterOut matchesPhrase(Service, "background threads") or
            matchesPhrase(Service, "Health") or 
            matchesPhrase(Service, "SpringBoot") or 
             matchesPhrase(Service, "on port")

1.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| limit 100
1.title: Requests

10.query:
timeseries latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99), 
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          latency_p99
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p99) desc
| limit 100
10.title: Latency_p99

12.query:
timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: 
           in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))       
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance),
          cpu
| sort arrayAvg(cpu) desc
| limit 100
12.title: CPU Usage %

13.query:
timeseries memory = avg(dt.process.memory.working_set_size),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: 
           in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))         
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance),
          memory
| sort arrayAvg(memory) desc
| limit 100
13.title: Memory Used

14.query:
timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))       

| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.clr.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))
           ]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.go.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI)) 
         ]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))
         ]
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance),
          gc_time
| sort arrayAvg(gc_time) desc
| limit 100
14.title: Garbage collection suspension time

leftYAxisSettings.label: Garbage collection suspension time • .NET: Garbage collection suspension time • Go: Garbage collection suspension time • Node.js: Garbage collection suspension time

18.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter `dt.davis.is_duplicate` == false
| sort timestamp desc
| expand affected_entity_ids
| filter in(affected_entity_ids, array($ServiceID)) or
         in(affected_entity_ids, array($PGI))
// Lookup for affected_entity_ids and root_cause_entity_id Start



| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.services"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.pgi"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.application], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.applications"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.mobile_application], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.mobile"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.custom_application], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.customapplication"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.cloud_application], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.cloudapplication"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.synthetic_test], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.synthetictest"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.http_check], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.httpcheck"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.multiprotocol_monitor], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.multiprotocolmonitor"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.kubernetes_cluster], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.kubernetescluster"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.host], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.hosts"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.custom_device], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.customdevices"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.hypervisor], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.hypervisor"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.environment], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.environment"
// Lookup for affected_entity_ids and root_cause_entity_id End

// Summarzation Start - Group Probem Events by Problem ID
| summarize {startTime = takeFirst(event.start),
            endTime = takeFirst(event.end),
            problemClosedDuration = takeFirst(resolved_problem_duration),
            status = takeFirst(event.status),
            event.name = takeFirst(event.name),
            severityLevel = takeFirst(event.category),
            affected = takeFirst(affected_entity_ids),
            rootCause = takeFirst(root_cause_entity_name),
            rootCauseEntityId = takeFirst(root_cause_entity_id),
            dt.davis.is_duplicate = takeFirst(dt.davis.is_duplicate),
            affectedServices = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.servicesentity.name),
            affectedPGI = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.pgientity.name),
            affectedApplications = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.applicationsentity.name),
            affectedMobile = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.mobileentity.name),
            affectedCustomApplication = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.customapplicationentity.name),
            affectedCloudApplication = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.cloudapplicationentity.name),
            affectedSyntheticTest = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.synthetictestentity.name),
            affectedHttpCheck = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.httpcheckentity.name),
            affectedMultiprotocolMonitor = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.multiprotocolmonitorentity.name),
            affectedKubernetesCluster = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.kubernetesclusterentity.name),
            affectedHosts = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.hostsentity.name),
            affectedCustomDevices = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.customdevicesentity.name),
            affectedHypervisor = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.hypervisorentity.name),
            affectedEnvironment = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.environmententity.name),
            event.id = takeFirst(event.id)}, 

            by:{display_id, event.kind}
//| filter `dt.davis.is_duplicate` == false
| fieldsAdd currentTime = toTimestamp(now())
| fieldsAdd Description = concat(display_id," - ",event.name)
// Summarzation End - Group Probem Events by Problem ID


// Final Result Start
| fields Status = status,       
         Description = concat("🔥[", Description,"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.problems/problem/",event.id,")"),    
         Affected = arrayRemoveNulls(arrayConcat(affectedApplications,affectedMobile,affectedCustomApplication,affectedCloudApplication,affectedSyntheticTest,affectedHttpCheck,affectedServices,affectedPGI,affectedKubernetesCluster,affectedHosts,affectedHypervisor,affectedCustomDevices,affectedEnvironment,affectedMultiprotocolMonitor)),
         RootCause = if(isNotNull(rootCause), 
           concat("[", rootCause, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=", rootCauseEntityId, "&detailsFrom=",startTime,"&detailsTo=",endTime, ")")
           , else:""),
         StartTime = startTime,
         EndTime =  if((status == "ACTIVE"),"In Progress", 
                    else:if((status == "CLOSED"),endTime)),   
         Duration = if((status == "CLOSED"),problemClosedDuration,
                    else:if((status == "ACTIVE"), currentTime-startTime)),
         event.id,
         event.kind
| sort StartTime, direction:"descending"
| sort Status, direction:"ascending"
// Final Result End

2.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100
2.title: Failed Requests

21.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599 and
           in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100
21.title: 5xx Errors

22.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499 and
           in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100
22.title: 4xx Errors

26.query:
timeseries total = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           failed = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true, 
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID)) 
| fieldsAdd success = total[] -failed[]
| fields timeframe,
         interval,
         success,
         failed
26.title: Requests - Success vs Failed

27.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{endpoint.name},
           filter: endpoint.name != "NON_KEY_REQUESTS" and
           in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          endpoint.name,
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc         
| limit 100
27.title: Requests - Key Requests

28.query: data record(a="SERVICE HEALTH: Open Service, Analyzed Failed Spans or Analyze Service Failures" )

29.query: data record(a="PROBLEMS: Open Problem or Root Cause Service" )

3.query:
timeseries latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          latency_p90
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p90) desc
| limit 100
3.title: Latency_p90

35.query: data record(a="TRACES WITH EXCEPTIONS: Click on Endpoint to open Trace. Or use Open-With Davis CoPilot to explain Exception" )

36.query: data record(a="LOGS WITH ERRORS: Use Open-With on a Log to Drill to the Trace - OR - Ask CoPilot to Explain it to you" )

37.query:
fetch logs
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "astroshop"
| filter in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI)) 
         and isNotNull(trace_id)
         and in(status, "WARN", "ERROR") 
| parse content, "JSON:jsonContent"
| fields 
         Time = timestamp,
         Status = status,
         timestamp,                  
         Content =  if(isNull(jsonContent), content, 
           else: jsonContent),
         Process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance),
         Host = entityName(dt.entity.host),
         trace_id,
         span_id,
         `Trace Context` = if(isNotNull(trace_id), concat(endpoint.name, "[📉Analyze](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse\u0026l=true\u0026sidebar=a%2Cfalse\u0026filter=trace.id+%3D+",
                         trace_id,"\u0026traceId=",trace_id,"\u0026tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,"\u0026pb=true","\u0026tt=",encodeUrl(toString(timestamp)),")"), else: `no trace`),
         dt.source_entity
| filter contains(Content[msg],"Visa or Mastercard")  
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 1000
| fieldsAdd prompt=concat("Analyze the Log and Stacktrace and explain what it means for my service and how to fix it", `Status`, ":", Content[msg]), execute=true, contexts=array(record(type="supplementary", value=substring(concat(Content[err][stack], " service.name"), to:20000)))

39.query:
fetch spans
| filter k8s.namespace.name == "astroshop"
| filter in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| filter rpc.service != "flagd.evaluation.v1.Service"

| fieldsAdd Service = rpc.service
| fieldsAdd exception.stacktrace = span.events[][exception.stack_trace]
| fieldsAdd exception.class = span.events[0][exception.type]
| fieldsAdd eventname = span.events[0][span_event.name]
| fieldsAdd exception.message = toString(span.events[][exception.message])
| fieldsAdd trace_id = toString(trace.id), span_id = toString(span.id)

| filter eventname == "exception"
| filter isNotNull(span.exit_by_exception_id)

| fields Time = start_time,
         start_time,
         end_time,
         Service,
         Endpoint = concat("[", if(isnull(endpoint.name), span.name, else: endpoint.name), "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse\u0026sidebar=a%2Cfalse\u0026filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+endpoint.name+%3D+",endpoint.name,"+AND+trace.id+%3D+",
                         trace_id,"\u0026traceId=",trace_id,"\u0026spanId=",span_id,"\u0026tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,"\u0026pb=true","\u0026tt=",encodeUrl(toString(start_time)),")"),
         ExceptionClass = if(isNotNull(exception.class),exception.class, else:"N/A"),
         ExceptionMesssage = concat("🤖 ", if(isNotNull(exception.message),exception.message, else:"N/A")),
         Exception = if(isNotNull(exception.stacktrace),exception.stacktrace, else:"N/A"),
         Duration = duration,
         dt.entity.service, 
         trace.id,
         span.id     
| sort start_time desc
| limit 200
| fieldsAdd prompt=concat("Analyze the Exception, Service and Endpoint and tell me how to fix the exception ", `ExceptionClass`, ":", ExceptionMesssage), execute=true, contexts=array(record(type="supplementary", value=substring(concat(`Exception`, " Service", `Endpoint`), to:20000)))

40.content:
## Co-Pilot enabled Self-Service Dashboard for Technical Service Owners
This dashboard gives you a quick access to all relevant services, detected problems, critical exceptions, key availability and resiliency metrics as well as one-click access to relevant logs and traces to troubleshoot any issues!

**TO START:** Select the services you are interested in in the top-left Service drop down. **ASK CoPilot** via Open-With for Exceptions and Logs!

9.query:
timeseries latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          latency_p50
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p50) desc
| limit 100
9.title: Latency_p50

variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.service
| filter isNotNull(belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace])
| fields id, Service = entity.name, namespace = belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace]
| expand namespace 
| fieldsAdd namespace = entityName(namespace, type:"dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace")
| filter namespace == "astroshop"
| filterOut matchesPhrase(Service, "background threads") or
            matchesPhrase(Service, "Health") or 
            matchesPhrase(Service, "SpringBoot") or 
            matchesPhrase(Service, "on port")
| fields Service
| dedup Service

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter in(entity.name, array($Service))
| dedup id
| fields id
| limit 20

timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage),
           by: {dt.entity.process_group_instance,
                dt.entity.process_group}
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.service = entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group, type:"dt.entity.process_group", "runs") 
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.service = dt.entity.service[dt.entity.service]
| filter in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields dt.entity.process_group_instance
